resources.name: Hugging Face model hub
resources.what: 1M+ open ML models. Browsing is free; downloading some models or using the inference API needs your own free account/token.
resources.blurb: the world's open-model attic. mostly free — bring your own token for the gated shelves.

resources.name: Ollama model library
resources.what: Hundreds of open LLMs you can pull and run locally for free with one command. No key.
resources.blurb: run a real model on your own machine. `ollama run qwen2.5` — sovereign, no cloud.
